era_context: Middle Bronze Age in the Levant and Egypt; Egypt's 12th Dynasty is in its final decades. In Mesopotamia, the Old Babylonian period is in decline; Kassite Babylon is rising. The Hittite Old Kingdom is consolidating power in Anatolia. In the Aegean, the Middle Minoan period continues on Crete. This is an era of palace-based economies, cuneiform literacy, and regional trade networks.
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified; no events are listed for this year.
historiographic_note: 1870 BCE is not documented in any known contemporary source. The historical record for this year is entirely absent. Scholars can only infer the broader context from archaeological evidence and later chronicles, but no specific events can be reliably dated to this year. Year-by-year history is not recoverable for the Bronze Age in most regions.
